name: Remove Bleaching
description: Removes photobleaching effects from fluorescence signals.
author: Daniel Zanelli

parameters.name: input_csv
parameters.label: Input CSV
parameters.description: CSV file with the raw fluorescence traces

parameters.name: baseline_lam
parameters.label: ALS baseline: lambda
parameters.description: Regularization of the first ALS correction

parameters.name: baseline_p
parameters.label: ALS baseline: p
parameters.description: Weight asymmetry of the first ALS correction

parameters.name: baseline_niter
parameters.label: ALS baseline: iterations
parameters.description: Iterations for the first ALS correction

parameters.name: baseline_lam_factor
parameters.label: ALS baseline: lambda factor
parameters.description: Lambda factor for the adaptive ramp at the start and end

parameters.name: baseline_rampup_fraction
parameters.label: ALS baseline: ramp-up fraction
parameters.description: Initial fraction of samples with a lambda ramp

parameters.name: baseline_rampdown_fraction
parameters.label: ALS baseline: ramp-down fraction
parameters.description: Final fraction of samples with a lambda ramp

parameters.name: smooth_lam
parameters.label: ALS final smoothing: lambda
parameters.description: Regularization for the final smoothing over the corrected signal

parameters.name: smooth_p
parameters.label: ALS final smoothing: p
parameters.description: Weight asymmetry of the final smoothing

parameters.name: output_dir
parameters.label: Output folder
parameters.description: Folder where the corrected CSV will be saved

outputs.baseline_csv: Path to the CSV with the estimated ALS baseline
outputs.corrected_csv: Path to the CSV file with the corrected traces
outputs.smoothed_csv: Path to the CSV with the final smoothed signal
